title: Copy cell value and paste it as plain text in text column

posts.author: Arek (Arkadiusz)
posts.cookedHtml:
Copy cell value and paste it as plain text in text column

Automation

  • Copy Status column and paste status text in Text column
  • Copy item update and paste it in text column
  • Use text from text column in automation to assign appropriate Status, e.g. Text “London” - assign status by automation or from dropdown “London”

Now to achieve this you need to use external applications. This is basic functionality in automation that should be added.
